scripts.dev: concurrently -names "admin,web-client,auth,patient,doctor,appointment,telemedicine" -prefix name "npm run dev --prefix admin" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/web-client" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/patient-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/doctor-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/appointment-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/telemedicine-service"
